description: Go HTTP server using http.ListenAndServeTLS which enables HTTP/2, transitively reaching the vulnerable HPACK decoder readMetaFrame in golang.org/x/net (CVE-2022-41723).

provenance.ground_truth_notes: http.ListenAndServeTLS enables HTTP/2 which transitively invokes the vulnerable HPACK decoder readMetaFrame in x/net/http2

findings.human_justification: ListenAndServeTLS enables HTTP/2 transparently, which uses x/net/http2 HPACK decoder. The vulnerable readMetaFrame function is reached transitively through the HTTP/2 stack.
